name: Giromon

signature_move.name: Deadly Bomb
signature_move.description: Throws a super powerful hand grenade.

description: A Digimon who patrols within the Computer Network while floating lightly in the air. Also known as the " Net Keeper ", it repels Digimon who try to enter the Network illegally. It is a truly frightening Digimon; the moment it judges someone to be an enemy, it will fend them off with all the attacks it is able to muster, and it is said that if it is driven into a predicament, it will completely annihilate the intruder by blowing itself up. Its Special Move is a super-powerful hand grenade ( Deadly Bomb ).
